message:
test(core): property-based tests for lock and notifications (15 tests)

lock (6 tests): LockMetadata serde roundtrips, deterministic
serialization, pretty-print roundtrip, JSON field presence.

notifications (9 tests): NotificationPayload serde roundtrips,
deterministic serialization, skip_serializing_if behavior for
quick_fix, confidence bounds, severity validation, field presence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
